A '''[[Bith/Legends|Bith]]''' worked as a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
This bounty hunter was part of a bounty hunter group on [[Centares/Legends|Centares]] shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. When the name of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|who]] destroyed the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]] was revealed, [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Vader]] and his [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] [[Death/Legends|killed]] the Bith, along with every other individual who heard it.

==Behind the scenes==
This unidentified Bith was created by ''Star Wars'' artist [[Dave Gibbons]] for [[Vader's Quest 1]] of the [[Star Wars: Vader's Quest|''Vader's Quest'']] series of comics, published in [[1999]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]].

==Appearances==
*[[Vader's Quest 1|''Vader's Quest'' 1]] {{1st}}
